# Generated by tools/generate_plane_role_licensing.py.
# Role capability checks include only the technologies used by that exact variant.

DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_hmg
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_2
	has_tech = survivability_studies
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_1
}

DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_2
	has_tech = aircraft_construction
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

	DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_license = yes

	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}

	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
	}

DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_share_basic_small_airframe_role_design = {
	OR = {
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	}
}

DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
	}
}

DAI_has_deliverable_basic_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_hmg
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_3
	has_tech = survivability_studies
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = interwar_antitank
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_3
	has_tech = survivability_studies
	has_tech = aircraft_construction
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_3
}

	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_3
	has_tech = engines_3
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_1
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_1
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_hmg
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_3
	has_tech = survivability_studies
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_3
	has_tech = engines_3
	has_tech = survivability_studies
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_1
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = air_torpedoe_1
	has_tech = engines_2
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_share_improved_small_airframe_role_design = {
	OR = {
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	}
}

DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
	}
}

DAI_has_deliverable_improved_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_hmg
	has_tech = engines_4
	has_tech = survivability_studies
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_4
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = aa_lmg
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = antitank2
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_4
	has_tech = survivability_studies
	has_tech = aircraft_construction
	has_tech = range_improvements
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_4
}

DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_license = yes
	has_tech = early_bombs
	has_tech = engines_3
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
	NOT = {
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_full
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_full_c
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_full_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_b_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_engine
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_engine_b
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_engine_licensed
	}
}

DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_a_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_base
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_base_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_design_weapon
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_profile_weapon_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a2
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_a2_licensed
		has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_legacy_a2_design_as_a
	}
}

DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_provider_for_prev = {
	any_other_country = {
		DAI_is_air_license_provider_for_prev = yes
		OR = {
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

		OR = {

		}

	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			ROOT = { DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes }
			NOT = { DAI_has_better_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_provider_for_prev = yes }
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					DAI_has_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_can_share_advanced_small_airframe_role_design = {
	OR = {
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		DAI_can_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	}
}

DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
		DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
	}
}

DAI_has_deliverable_advanced_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			ROOT = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
					AND = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
